commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c03c533a5122c90310e63286a26a66ed57696717)
commands.review_summary:
The PR delegates Slack presentation rendering through the channel outbound facade and changes payload receipt-kind inference/tests so presentation or `channelData` payloads are reported as cards.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +113. Total +127 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The issue is source-reproducible: current main parses `presentation`, core only invokes an exposed `handler.renderPresentation` after capability adaptation, and the Slack facade lacks the complete presentation bridge; I did not run a live Slack workspace send.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the contributor must provide real Slack proof and the patch needs code changes before merge; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: fix(slack): add renderPresentation to channel outbound adapter
target.body:
## Summary
Fix Slack Block Kit rendering for MessagePresentation payloads by adding the missing `renderPresentation` delegate on `slackChannelOutbound`. Also correct the receipt part kind priority so `card` is reported instead of `text` when rich presentation or channelData is present.

Fixes #95440

## Root cause
The `slackChannelOutbound` (registered as the plugin's `ChannelOutboundAdapter` in `channel.ts`) was missing the `renderPresentation` method. The `slackOutbound` inner adapter (`outbound-adapter.ts`) has had a working `renderPresentation` implementation, but the outer channel adapter never delegated to it.

When the core delivery pipeline calls `renderPresentationForDelivery`:
1. It looks up `handler.renderPresentation` from the channel's outbound adapter
2. For Slack, this was `undefined` because `slackChannelOutbound` didn't have it
3. The pipeline falls through to `renderMessagePresentationFallbackText`, converting the presentation into plain text
4. The payload is then delivered as plain text instead of Block Kit

The fix adds the missing delegate, following the same pattern used by `sendPayload` (which already delegates to `slackOutbound.sendPayload` via `loadSlackOutboundAdapterModule`).

Additionally, `resolvePayloadReceiptKind` in `outbound-bridge.ts` was checking `text` before `presentation`/`interactive`, causing payloads with both text and presentation to report `"text"` instead of `"card"`. The priority is now: presentation/interactive â†’ channelData â†’ text.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: Slack messages with `--presentation` payload never render as Block Kit; always fall back to plain text. Receipt reports `kind: "text"` instead of `kind: "card"`.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 22.19, Linux
- **Code analysis path**: See root cause analysis above
- **Test framework**: Vitest

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
pnpm test extensions/slack/src/channel.test.ts
pnpm test extensions/slack/src/outbound-payload.test.ts
pnpm test src/channels/message/outbound-bridge.test.ts
```

**After-fix evidence**:
```
extensions/slack/src/channel.test.ts: 45 passed (45)
extensions/slack/src/outbound-payload.test.ts: 10 passed (10)
src/channels/message/outbound-bridge.test.ts: 11 passed (11)
```

**Observed result after the fix**: `slackChannelOutbound.renderPresentation` now exists and delegates to `slackOutbound.renderPresentation`, which builds `presentationBlocks` stored in `channelData.slack.presentationBlocks`. The core delivery pipeline invokes it before `sendPayload`, so Block Kit blocks are produced. The receipt kind correctly reports `"card"` when presentation or channelData is present.

**What was not tested**: Live end-to-end with a real Slack workspace (Socket Mode). The source-level fix is verified through unit tests that confirm the render delegate exists and returns correct presentation blocks.

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | âś… | 2 new tests in channel.test.ts + 3 new tests in outbound-bridge.test.ts; all existing tests pass |
| Type Check | âś… | `tsgo` clean |
| Lint | âś… | `oxlint` clean on changed files |

## Risk checklist
**Did user-visible behavior change?** `Yes` - Slack presentation payloads that were incorrectly delivered as plain text now render as Block Kit. This is a bug fix restoring the documented behavior.

**Did config, environment, or migration behavior change?** `No`

**Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change?** `No`

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested
